signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your identifier and we'll send you a reset link.

success.title: Check your email
success.message: If an account exists for that identifier, we've sent a reset link.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.userNotFound: No account found for that identifier. Please make sure you are using the correct credentials.
errors.emailAlreadyInUse: This identifier is already registered. Please sign in instead.
errors.incorrectCredentials: The identifier or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
errors.limitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.passwordRequirements: The password does not meet the necessary requirements.
errors.invalidParameters: The parameters provided are invalid. Please check the information and try again.
errors.signInError: There was an error signing in. Please try again later.
errors.signUpError: There was an error during registration. Please try again later.
errors.resetRequestError: There was an error requesting a password reset. Please try again later.
errors.resetConfirmError: There was an error resetting your password. Please try again later.
errors.tokenUnavailable: No session tokens available. Please sign in again.
errors.refreshTokenUnavailable: The session has expired and cannot be renewed. Please sign in again.
errors.refreshFailed: Error refreshing session. Please sign in again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
errors.invalidToken: The session token is invalid. Please sign in again.
